title: Better Visuality
description: Better Visuality is a simple modpack that will improve your gaming experience and make the game look better!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d895c30a3b70d3b2fe9bd08b8142c174f0f9c51f.png)
This pack aims to improve the game and add more visual additions to it that will brighten up your gaming experience. Both the appearance and some game mechanics have been changed. Such as online play in the local world with friends and the like. Added some new structures that will not stand out from the general style of the game. Visual effects for swimming, block placement, explosions, and so on have been added. This pack allows you to play on weaker PCs, so you can rest assured that it will not cause lags on your device.
Have a good game!
